---
title: "Operations"
---

> TODO: Part intro for operating procedures. SOPs live in `sops/` and
> render in three audience variants via Quarto profiles
> (`--profile sop-detailed | sop-checklist | sop-walkthrough`). Each
> SOP carries a formal revision block (rendered by the
> `{{< revisions >}}` shortcode) plus an auto-generated git change
> history.
